domain: Root public narrative, bounded release notes, and exact storage evidence.
examples: reader compares binary32, ordinary Q8, and RQ8 in one table
machine reader derives the exact 191-byte saving over Q8

inputs.name: fair-storage-baseline
inputs.contract: For 2,048 values: binary32=8,192 bytes, Q8 plus 64 float32 scales=2,304 bytes, RQ8=2,113 bytes, RQ8 saves 191 bytes or 8.289930555555555 percent versus Q8.

inputs.name: claim-boundary
inputs.contract: No runtime speed, portability, model quality, general compiler, or stable serialization claim.

verification: root README contains no Mesh TensorFlow reference or runtime performance claim
